S.FORM: 021"開始編輯
021"開始編輯
a. mama. pqutay misu cikay yaw nqa Sayun ga?
S.PHON: a. mama. pqutaj misu ʦikaj jaw nqa sajun ɣa?
S.FORM: a. mama. pqutay misu cikay yaw nqa Sayun ga?
S.PHON: a. mama. pqutaj mis~ɕu ʦ~ʨikaj jaw nqa s~ɕajun ɣa?

S.FORM: aw, kya qu nanu kinbaqun su, pinnongan su squliq ga', kayal cikay ma, ki. aw
S.PHON: aw, kja qu nanu kinβ~vaqun su, pinnoŋan su squliq ɣaʔ, kajal ʦikaj ma, ki. aw
S.FORM: aw, kya qu nanu kinbaqun su, pinnongan su squliq ga', kayal cikay ma, ki. aw
S.PHON: aw, kja qu nanu kinβaqun s~ɕu, pinnoŋan s~ɕu s~ɕquliq ɣaʔ, kajal ʦ~ʨikaj ma, ki. aw

S.FORM: a yaw nqa Sayun qani ga, kyalaw simu
S.PHON: a jaw nqa sajun qani ɣa, kjalaw simu
S.FORM: a yaw nqa Sayun qani ga, kyalaw simu
S.PHON: a jaw nqa s~ɕajun qani ɣa, kjalaw s~ɕimu

S.FORM: raral ga ini tnaq son mha i..qalang uzi pi.
S.PHON: raral ɣa ini tnaq son mħa i..qalaŋ uzi pi.
S.FORM: raral ga ini tnaq son mha i..qalang uzi pi.
S.PHON: raral ɣa ini tnaq s~ɕon mħa i..qalaŋ uzi pi.

S.FORM: qalang mu hiya ga Tayhocu Rato gun, Piyanan mu hiya.
S.PHON: qalaŋ mu ħija ɣa tajħoʦu rato ɣun, pijanan mu ħija.
S.FORM: qalang mu hiya ga Tayhocu Rato gun, Piyanan mu hiya.
S.PHON: qalaŋ mu ħija ɣa tajħoʦ~ʨu rato ɣun, pijanan mu ħija.

S.FORM: icibang pucing balay na rgyax. ru yaw nqa son mha i.
S.PHON: iʦiβ~vaŋ puʦiŋ β~valaj na rɣjax. ru jaw nqa son mħa i.
S.FORM: icibang pucing balay na rgyax. ru yaw nqa son mha i.
S.PHON: iʦ~ʨiβaŋ puʦ~ʨiŋ βalaj na rɣjax. ru jaw nqa s~ɕon mħa i.

S.FORM: pnongan son mha qa Sayun qani ga. Tayhukcu syogun Buta sya
S.PHON: pnoŋan son mħa qa sajun qani ɣa. tajħukʦu sjoɣun β~vuta sja
S.FORM: pnongan son mha qa Sayun qani ga. Tayhukcu syogun Buta sya
S.PHON: pnoŋan s~ɕon mħa qa s~ɕajun qani ɣa. tajħukʦ~ʨu s~ɕjoɣun βuta s~ɕja

S.FORM: Sayun no' Sayun no' qalang qa hiya pi
S.PHON: sajun noʔ sajun noʔ qalaŋ qa ħija pi
S.FORM: Sayun no' Sayun no' qalang qa hiya pi
S.PHON: s~ɕajun noʔ s~ɕajun noʔ qalaŋ qa ħija pi

S.FORM: tran sami qasa hiya lga,
S.PHON: tran sami qasa ħija lɣa,
S.FORM: tran sami qasa hiya lga,
S.PHON: tran s~ɕami qas~ɕa ħija lɣa,

S.FORM: mqwas sami na' ga pi. baqun sami yaqa Sayun mga
S.PHON: mqwas sami naʔ ɣa pi. β~vaqun sami jaqa sajun mɣa
S.FORM: mqwas sami na' ga pi. baqun sami yaqa Sayun mga
S.PHON: mqwas~ɕ s~ɕami naʔ ɣa pi. βaqun s~ɕami jaqa s~ɕajun mɣa

S.FORM: baha hmswa' Gilang keng hiya ga, raral hiya ne Tayhukcu son nya Nansan
S.PHON: β~vaħa ħmswaʔ ɣilaŋ keŋ ħija ɣa, raral ħija ne tajħukʦu son nja nansan
S.FORM: baha hmswa' Gilang keng hiya ga, raral hiya ne Tayhukcu son nya Nansan
S.PHON: βaħa ħms~ɕwaʔ ɣilaŋ keŋ ħija ɣa, raral ħija ne tajħukʦ~ʨu s~ɕon nja nans~ɕan

S.FORM: rakara Tayhukcu son nya ga ne, Ulay,Lunpya,Syora, BongBong,Banun,Lmwan,Suci' Nasang
S.PHON: rakara tajħukʦu son nja ɣa ne, ulaj,lunpja,sjora, β~voŋβ~voŋ,β~vanun,lmwan,suʦiʔ nasaŋ
S.FORM: rakara Tayhukcu son nya ga ne, Ulay,Lunpya,Syora, BongBong,Banun,Lmwan,Suci' Nasang
S.PHON: rakara tajħukʦ~ʨu s~ɕon nja ɣa ne, ulaj,lunpja,s~ɕjora, βoŋβoŋ,βanun,lmwan,s~ɕuʦ~ʨiʔ nas~ɕaŋ

S.FORM: syo lga ne, Nango qani ga ne
S.PHON: sjo lɣa ne, naŋo qani ɣa ne
S.FORM: syo lga ne, Nango qani ga ne
S.PHON: s~ɕjo lɣa ne, naŋo qani ɣa ne

S.FORM: Nang'o,piyahaw,Buta' ,Ropwe', Cinye Ray raksuy qani ga Gilang..Gilang ken son mha
S.PHON: naŋʔo,pijaħaw,β~vutaʔ ,ropweʔ, ʦinje raj raksuj qani ɣa ɣilaŋ..ɣilaŋ ken son mħa
S.FORM: Nang'o,piyahaw,Buta' ,Ropwe', Cinye Ray raksuy qani ga Gilang..Gilang ken son mha
S.PHON: naŋʔo,pijaħaw,βutaʔ ,ropweʔ, ʦ~ʨinje raj raks~ɕuj qani ɣa ɣilaŋ..ɣilaŋ ken s~ɕon mħa

S.FORM: hgan ke na qutux keng nyuax mha i. tnaq ken myan ga
S.PHON: ħɣan ke na qutux keŋ njuax mħa i. tnaq ken mjan ɣa
S.FORM: hgan ke na qutux keng nyuax mha i. tnaq ken myan ga
S.PHON: ħɣan ke na qutux keŋ njuax mħa i. tnaq ken mjan ɣa

S.FORM: gun ga ini tnaq pi
S.PHON: ɣun ɣa ini tnaq pi
S.FORM: gun ga ini tnaq pi
S.PHON: ɣun ɣa ini tnaq pi

S.FORM: ru sono toki ga mo' icinen sey saku la
S.PHON: ru sono toki ɣa moʔ iʦinen sej saku la
S.FORM: ru sono toki ga mo' icinen sey saku la
S.PHON: ru s~ɕono toki ɣa moʔ iʦ~ʨinen s~ɕej s~ɕaku la

S.FORM: socugyo saku lasa lga ne, mo maki sami gako ga
S.PHON: soʦuɣjo saku lasa lɣa ne, mo maki sami ɣako ɣa
S.FORM: socugyo saku lasa lga ne, mo maki sami gako ga
S.PHON: s~ɕoʦ~ʨuɣjo s~ɕaku las~ɕa lɣa ne, mo maki s~ɕami ɣako ɣa

S.FORM: socugyo sami maki sami gako ga, Kbuta sya no syuzi Sayun no tane
S.PHON: soʦuɣjo sami maki sami ɣako ɣa, kβ~vuta sja no sjuzi sajun no tane
S.FORM: socugyo sami maki sami gako ga, Kbuta sya no syuzi Sayun no tane
S.PHON: s~ɕoʦ~ʨuɣjo s~ɕami maki s~ɕami ɣako ɣa, kβuta s~ɕja no s~ɕjuzi s~ɕajun no tane

S.FORM: zyaw na tane kanzyo no tane yusyu balay ma, baha mswa'
S.PHON: zjaw na tane kanzjo no tane jusju β~valaj ma, β~vaħa mswaʔ
S.FORM: zyaw na tane kanzyo no tane yusyu balay ma, baha mswa'
S.PHON: zjaw na tane kanzjo no tane jus~ɕju βalaj ma, βaħa ms~ɕwaʔ

S.FORM: maki sami gako ga. pongan sensey kmayal pongan nya, onazi
S.PHON: maki sami ɣako ɣa. poŋan sensej kmajal poŋan nja, onazi
S.FORM: maki sami gako ga. pongan sensey kmayal pongan nya, onazi
S.PHON: maki s~ɕami ɣako ɣa. poŋan s~ɕens~ɕej kmajal poŋan nja, onazi

S.FORM: mtnaq ki sinsiy Gipun ru gipunson mha ka rangi nya ga
S.PHON: mtnaq ki sinsij ɣipun ru ɣipunson mħa ka raŋi nja ɣa
S.FORM: mtnaq ki sinsiy Gipun ru gipunson mha ka rangi nya ga
S.PHON: mtnaq ki s~ɕins~ɕij ɣipun ru ɣipuns~ɕon mħa ka raŋi nja ɣa

S.FORM: Tayal son nha i Sayun qani uzi pi.
S.PHON: tajal son nħa i sajun qani uzi pi.
S.FORM: Tayal son nha i Sayun qani uzi pi.
S.PHON: tajal s~ɕon nħa i s~ɕajun qani uzi pi.

S.FORM: mqbaq qu gako ma. sorere sazing qani ga ne
S.PHON: mqβ~vaq qu ɣako ma. sorere saziŋ qani ɣa ne
S.FORM: mqbaq qu gako ma. sorere sazing qani ga ne
S.PHON: mqβaq qu ɣako ma. s~ɕorere s~ɕaziŋ qani ɣa ne

S.FORM: ini 'maku ktay rqyas na uzi na'
S.PHON: ini ʔmaku ktaj rqjas na uzi naʔ
S.FORM: ini 'maku ktay rqyas na uzi na'
S.PHON: ini ʔmaku ktaj rqjas~ɕ na uzi naʔ

S.FORM: ktan lga ne, mciriq ru Gipun ru cyukoku lga
S.PHON: ktan lɣa ne, mʦiriq ru ɣipun ru ʦjukoku lɣa
S.FORM: ktan lga ne, mciriq ru Gipun ru cyukoku lga
S.PHON: ktan lɣa ne, mʦ~ʨiriq ru ɣipun ru ʦ~ʨjukoku lɣa

S.FORM: t'aring kya lga, musa hetay la
S.PHON: tʔariŋ kja lɣa, musa ħetaj la
S.FORM: t'aring kya lga, musa hetay la
S.PHON: tʔariŋ kja lɣa, mus~ɕa ħetaj la

S.FORM: musa hetay kwara sonmha i pinlawa nya lga ne
S.PHON: musa ħetaj kwara sonmħa i pinlawa nja lɣa ne
S.FORM: musa hetay kwara sonmha i pinlawa nya lga ne
S.PHON: mus~ɕa ħetaj kwara s~ɕonmħa i pinlawa nja lɣa ne

S.FORM: cyoro pongan myan ke lga ne
S.PHON: ʦjoro poŋan mjan ke lɣa ne
S.FORM: cyoro pongan myan ke lga ne
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨjoro poŋan mjan ke lɣa ne

S.FORM: syogun no Buta sya to sensey ga, musa hetayuzi ma
S.PHON: sjoɣun no β~vuta sja to sensej ɣa, musa ħetajuzi ma
S.FORM: syogun no Buta sya to sensey ga, musa hetayuzi ma
S.PHON: s~ɕjoɣun no βuta s~ɕja to s~ɕens~ɕej ɣa, mus~ɕa ħetajuzi ma

S.FORM: musa mciriq ma. ga sono toki mo, hngan lga mo
S.PHON: musa mʦiriq ma. ɣa sono toki mo, ħŋan lɣa mo
S.FORM: musa mciriq ma. ga sono toki mo, hngan lga mo
S.PHON: mus~ɕa mʦ~ʨiriq ma. ɣa s~ɕono toki mo, ħŋan lɣa mo

S.FORM: zyuw nanasay saku kya la.
S.PHON: zjuw nanasaj saku kja la.
S.FORM: zyuw nanasay saku kya la.
S.PHON: zjuw nanas~ɕaj s~ɕaku kja la.

S.FORM: aw ga, aw baq yaqih pongan Sayun mga, Sayun wa ga
S.PHON: aw ɣa, aw β~vaq jaqiħ poŋan sajun mɣa, sajun wa ɣa
S.FORM: aw ga, aw baq yaqih pongan Sayun mga, Sayun wa ga
S.PHON: aw ɣa, aw βaq jaqiħ poŋan s~ɕajun mɣa, s~ɕajun wa ɣa

S.FORM: ga Sayun qani ga, rima maki gakow, yaw nqa sensey qani ru hiya qani ga.
S.PHON: ɣa sajun qani ɣa, rima maki ɣakow, jaw nqa sensej qani ru ħija qani ɣa.
S.FORM: ga Sayun qani ga, rima maki gakow, yaw nqa sensey qani ru hiya qani ga.
S.PHON: ɣa s~ɕajun qani ɣa, rima maki ɣakow, jaw nqa s~ɕens~ɕej qani ru ħija qani ɣa.

S.FORM: kinbalay nha qwas qani lpi.
S.PHON: kinβ~valaj nħa qwas qani lpi.
S.FORM: kinbalay nha qwas qani lpi.
S.PHON: kinβalaj nħa qwas~ɕ qani lpi.

S.FORM: klayun nha qwas qani ga, ana inu? Gilang ken gogun no gakaow ga
S.PHON: klajun nħa qwas qani ɣa, ana inu? ɣilaŋ ken ɣoɣun no ɣakaow ɣa
S.FORM: klayun nha qwas qani ga, ana inu? Gilang ken gogun no gakaow ga
S.PHON: klajun nħa qwas~ɕ qani ɣa, ana inu? ɣilaŋ ken ɣoɣun no ɣakaow ɣa

S.FORM: baqun nha kwra qwas qani pi. rakara maki qutux ryax lga,
S.PHON: β~vaqun nħa kwra qwas qani pi. rakara maki qutux rjax lɣa,
S.FORM: baqun nha kwra qwas qani pi. rakara maki qutux ryax lga,
S.PHON: βaqun nħa kwra qwas~ɕ qani pi. rakara maki qutux rjax lɣa,

S.FORM: Rato..Ratosi ni na ega wa, kbalay kya ega Gipun la
S.PHON: rato..ratosi ni na eɣa wa, kβ~valaj kja eɣa ɣipun la
S.FORM: Rato..Ratosi ni na ega wa, kbalay kya ega Gipun la
S.PHON: rato..ratos~ɕi ni na eɣa wa, kβalaj kja eɣa ɣipun la

S.FORM: rakara, mhtu ega kya ga yaw na Sayun qani ru sinsiy qani la
S.PHON: rakara, mħtu eɣa kja ɣa jaw na sajun qani ru sinsij qani la
S.FORM: rakara, mhtu ega kya ga yaw na Sayun qani ru sinsiy qani la
S.PHON: rakara, mħtu eɣa kja ɣa jaw na s~ɕajun qani ru s~ɕins~ɕij qani la

S.FORM: htuw kya ega qa, nanu yasa qa osa nya hetay qani qa
S.PHON: ħtuw kja eɣa qa, nanu jasa qa osa nja ħetaj qani qa
S.FORM: htuw kya ega qa, nanu yasa qa osa nya hetay qani qa
S.PHON: ħtuw kja eɣa qa, nanu jas~ɕa qa os~ɕa nja ħetaj qani qa

S.FORM: ega nya ru hetay sang cingagay Sayun qani ru
S.PHON: eɣa nja ru ħetaj saŋ ʦiŋaɣaj sajun qani ru
S.FORM: ega nya ru hetay sang cingagay Sayun qani ru
S.PHON: eɣa nja ru ħetaj s~ɕaŋ ʦ~ʨiŋaɣaj s~ɕajun qani ru

S.FORM: wal mqluy Butasya no llyun qani ga wal trahu balay na Gipun
S.PHON: wal mqluj β~vutasja no lljun qani ɣa wal traħu β~valaj na ɣipun
S.FORM: wal mqluy Butasya no llyun qani ga wal trahu balay na Gipun
S.PHON: wal mqluj βutas~ɕja no lljun qani ɣa wal traħu βalaj na ɣipun

S.FORM: galu' balay hetay rangi qani, wal hetay
S.PHON: ɣaluʔ β~valaj ħetaj raŋi qani, wal ħetaj
S.FORM: galu' balay hetay rangi qani, wal hetay
S.PHON: ɣaluʔ βalaj ħetaj raŋi qani, wal ħetaj

S.FORM: wal ta cinpgagay sisiy hetay ga
S.PHON: wal ta ʦinpɣaɣaj sisij ħetaj ɣa
S.FORM: wal ta cinpgagay sisiy hetay ga
S.PHON: wal ta ʦ~ʨinpɣaɣaj s~ɕis~ɕij ħetaj ɣa

S.FORM: ungat spngan behuy ru lokah bay son mha qsya qani ru
S.PHON: uŋat spŋan β~veħuj ru lokaħ β~vaj son mħa qsja qani ru
S.FORM: ungat spngan behuy ru lokah bay son mha qsya qani ru
S.PHON: uŋat s~ɕpŋan βeħuj ru lokaħ βaj s~ɕon mħa qs~ɕja qani ru

S.FORM: yasa balay a moyaw son mha rangi nya Gipun qasa lga
S.PHON: jasa β~valaj a mojaw son mħa raŋi nja ɣipun qasa lɣa
S.FORM: yasa balay a moyaw son mha rangi nya Gipun qasa lga
S.PHON: jas~ɕa βalaj a mojaw s~ɕon mħa raŋi nja ɣipun qas~ɕa lɣa

S.FORM: bang balay ima baq kehuy yulung son mna i qsya qasa lga
S.PHON: β~vaŋ β~valaj ima β~vaq keħuj juluŋ son mna i qsja qasa lɣa
S.FORM: bang balay ima baq kehuy yulung son mna i qsya qasa lga
S.PHON: βaŋ βalaj ima βaq keħuj juluŋ s~ɕon mna i qs~ɕja qas~ɕa lɣa

S.FORM: mhoyaw uzi Sayun lga ne, tnaq balay qba; nya, hluyun nya
S.PHON: mħojaw uzi sajun lɣa ne, tnaq β~valaj qβ~va; nja, ħlujun nja
S.FORM: mhoyaw uzi Sayun lga ne, tnaq balay qba; nya, hluyun nya
S.PHON: mħojaw uzi s~ɕajun lɣa ne, tnaq βalaj qβa; nja, ħlujun nja

S.FORM: syaw qsya lga, t'alax qba', wa qluy Sayun hiya lpi.
S.PHON: sjaw qsja lɣa, tʔalax qβ~vaʔ, wa qluj sajun ħija lpi.
S.FORM: syaw qsya lga, t'alax qba', wa qluy Sayun hiya lpi.
S.PHON: s~ɕjaw qs~ɕja lɣa, tʔalax qβaʔ, wa qluj s~ɕajun ħija lpi.

S.FORM: qluy yaqa Sayun lga, kwara qalang kekangi lga ne'
S.PHON: qluj jaqa sajun lɣa, kwara qalaŋ kekaŋi lɣa neʔ
S.FORM: qluy yaqa Sayun lga, kwara qalang kekangi lga ne'
S.PHON: qluj jaqa s~ɕajun lɣa, kwara qalaŋ kekaŋi lɣa neʔ

S.FORM: yaba nya yaya nya kwara qeqalang, 'lwan nha, lyung bih nqa
S.PHON: jaβ~va nja jaja nja kwara qeqalaŋ, ʔlwan nħa, ljuŋ β~viħ nqa
S.FORM: yaba nya yaya nya kwara qeqalang, 'lwan nha, lyung bih nqa
S.PHON: jaβa nja jaja nja kwara qeqalaŋ, ʔlwan nħa, ljuŋ βiħ nqa

S.FORM: hi' sazing sinsiy qasa lga, baha nya ktan wa i wal hetay la.
S.PHON: ħiʔ saziŋ sinsij qasa lɣa, β~vaħa nja ktan wa i wal ħetaj la.
S.FORM: hi' sazing sinsiy qasa lga, baha nya ktan wa i wal hetay la.
S.PHON: ħiʔ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕins~ɕij qas~ɕa lɣa, βaħa nja ktan wa i wal ħetaj la.

S.FORM: rakara pongan myan yaw nqa Sayun qani ga
S.PHON: rakara poŋan mjan jaw nqa sajun qani ɣa
S.FORM: rakara pongan myan yaw nqa Sayun qani ga
S.PHON: rakara poŋan mjan jaw nqa s~ɕajun qani ɣa

S.FORM: Tayal i ana inu Tayal baqun nha son mha wa i
S.PHON: tajal i ana inu tajal β~vaqun nħa son mħa wa i
S.FORM: Tayal i ana inu Tayal baqun nha son mha wa i
S.PHON: tajal i ana inu tajal βaqun nħa s~ɕon mħa wa i

S.FORM: iyal mwah hetay uzi Sayun qani
S.PHON: ijal mwaħ ħetaj uzi sajun qani
S.FORM: iyal mwah hetay uzi Sayun qani
S.PHON: ijal mwaħ ħetaj uzi s~ɕajun qani

S.FORM: gagay no gagay na rangi nya qasa ru wal nya lgan hoqil
S.PHON: ɣaɣaj no ɣaɣaj na raŋi nja qasa ru wal nja lɣan ħoqil
S.FORM: gagay no gagay na rangi nya qasa ru wal nya lgan hoqil
S.PHON: ɣaɣaj no ɣaɣaj na raŋi nja qas~ɕa ru wal nja lɣan ħoqil

S.FORM: qasa ga ana inu son mha i qalang Sayun no kane
S.PHON: qasa ɣa ana inu son mħa i qalaŋ sajun no kane
S.FORM: qasa ga ana inu son mha i qalang Sayun no kane
S.PHON: qas~ɕa ɣa ana inu s~ɕon mħa i qalaŋ s~ɕajun no kane

S.FORM: htuw ega uzi ru kwara son mha i Tayal ga, baqun nha son mha i Sayun
S.PHON: ħtuw eɣa uzi ru kwara son mħa i tajal ɣa, β~vaqun nħa son mħa i sajun
S.FORM: htuw ega uzi ru kwara son mha i Tayal ga, baqun nha son mha i Sayun
S.PHON: ħtuw eɣa uzi ru kwara s~ɕon mħa i tajal ɣa, βaqun nħa s~ɕon mħa i s~ɕajun

S.FORM: Sayun qani ga betunux balay ru srangi nqa hetay na sinsiy na Gipun
S.PHON: sajun qani ɣa β~vetunux β~valaj ru sraŋi nqa ħetaj na sinsij na ɣipun
S.FORM: Sayun qani ga betunux balay ru srangi nqa hetay na sinsiy na Gipun
S.PHON: s~ɕajun qani ɣa βetunux βalaj ru s~ɕraŋi nqa ħetaj na s~ɕins~ɕij na ɣipun

S.FORM: wal i mciriq ru pingagay nya rangi nya qani
S.PHON: wal i mʦiriq ru piŋaɣaj nja raŋi nja qani
S.FORM: wal i mciriq ru pingagay nya rangi nya qani
S.PHON: wal i mʦ~ʨiriq ru piŋaɣaj nja raŋi nja qani

S.FORM: hqelan son mha i Sayun qani, qwas qani wal pongan uzi pi
S.PHON: ħqelan son mħa i sajun qani, qwas qani wal poŋan uzi pi
S.FORM: hqelan son mha i Sayun qani, qwas qani wal pongan uzi pi
S.PHON: ħqelan s~ɕon mħa i s~ɕajun qani, qwas~ɕ qani wal poŋan uzi pi

S.FORM: yasa i skal maku pi, son mha i bsinsiy qasa uzi ga
S.PHON: jasa i skal maku pi, son mħa i β~vsinsij qasa uzi ɣa
S.FORM: yasa i skal maku pi, son mha i bsinsiy qasa uzi ga
S.PHON: jas~ɕa i s~ɕkal maku pi, s~ɕon mħa i βs~ɕins~ɕij qas~ɕa uzi ɣa

S.FORM: hlawah balay uzi, Rato i ktan myan ega
S.PHON: ħlawaħ β~valaj uzi, rato i ktan mjan eɣa
S.FORM: hlawah balay uzi, Rato i ktan myan ega
S.PHON: ħlawaħ βalaj uzi, rato i ktan mjan eɣa

S.FORM: aki ega talagay inu kya ega mwa mita ega kya ru
S.PHON: aki eɣa talaɣaj inu kja eɣa mwa mita eɣa kja ru
S.FORM: aki ega talagay inu kya ega mwa mita ega kya ru
S.PHON: aki eɣa talaɣaj inu kja eɣa mwa mita eɣa kja ru

S.FORM: Tayal kska panga tokan pi, kya nanu qu yaba ni Sayun yaya nya
S.PHON: tajal kska paŋa tokan pi, kja nanu qu jaβ~va ni sajun jaja nja
S.FORM: Tayal kska panga tokan pi, kya nanu qu yaba ni Sayun yaya nya
S.PHON: tajal ks~ɕka paŋa tokan pi, kja nanu qu jaβa ni s~ɕajun jaja nja

S.FORM: yaya mwah waya ru laxan nya ru musa hkangi laqi qani
S.PHON: jaja mwaħ waja ru laxan nja ru musa ħkaŋi laqi qani
S.FORM: yaya mwah waya ru laxan nya ru musa hkangi laqi qani
S.PHON: jaja mwaħ waja ru laxan nja ru mus~ɕa ħkaŋi laqi qani

S.FORM: wal kanzo balay Gipun. okanzo kwara son mha i, sinsiy i talagay
S.PHON: wal kanzo β~valaj ɣipun. okanzo kwara son mħa i, sinsij i talaɣaj
S.FORM: wal kanzo balay Gipun. okanzo kwara son mha i, sinsiy i talagay
S.PHON: wal kanzo βalaj ɣipun. okanzo kwara s~ɕon mħa i, s~ɕins~ɕij i talaɣaj

S.FORM: kneril Tayal laxi rangi yasa. yaqih hazi zyaw phoqil mha ke nya pi.
S.PHON: kneril tajal laxi raŋi jasa. jaqiħ ħazi zjaw pħoqil mħa ke nja pi.
S.FORM: kneril Tayal laxi rangi yasa. yaqih hazi zyaw phoqil mha ke nya pi.
S.PHON: kneril tajal laxi raŋi jas~ɕa. jaqiħ ħazi zjaw pħoqil mħa ke nja pi.

S.FORM: ga qwas qani ga, kwara qson mha kakugun
S.PHON: ɣa qwas qani ɣa, kwara qson mħa kakuɣun
S.FORM: ga qwas qani ga, kwara qson mha kakugun
S.PHON: ɣa qwas~ɕ qani ɣa, kwara qs~ɕon mħa kakuɣun

S.FORM: Tayhuksi no kno gako wa, biqan nya qwas qani ru
S.PHON: tajħuksi no kno ɣako wa, β~viqan nja qwas qani ru
S.FORM: Tayhuksi no kno gako wa, biqan nya qwas qani ru
S.PHON: tajħuks~ɕi no kno ɣako wa, βiqan nja qwas~ɕ qani ru

S.FORM: ana inu Tayal ga baqun nha qwas Sayun no tane qani ma
S.PHON: ana inu tajal ɣa β~vaqun nħa qwas sajun no tane qani ma
S.FORM: ana inu Tayal ga baqun nha qwas Sayun no tane qani ma
S.PHON: ana inu tajal ɣa βaqun nħa qwas~ɕ s~ɕajun no tane qani ma

S.FORM: hngaw cikay ha ki nbu'w cikay qsya ha, pqutay misu lozi kira.
S.PHON: ħŋaw ʦikaj ħa ki nβ~vuʔw ʦikaj qsja ħa, pqutaj misu lozi kira.
S.FORM: hngaw cikay ha ki nbu'w cikay qsya ha, pqutay misu lozi kira.
S.PHON: ħŋaw ʦ~ʨikaj ħa ki nβuʔw ʦ~ʨikaj qs~ɕja ħa, pqutaj mis~ɕu lozi kira.
